Docs.summary: A Class representing a Bucket along with the instance operations that can be performed on it. If you have a you can construct a from an instance of using the GetBucketResource method. Otherwise you can get one from its parent resource using the GetBucket method.

Docs.summary:
Generate the access key and secret key used for accessing the specified volume bucket and store in Azure Key Vault.

Resource

Docs.param: The bucket's Access and Secret key pair expiry time expressed as the number of days from now.
Docs.summary:
Generate the access key and secret key used for accessing the specified volume bucket. Also return expiry date and time of key pair (in UTC).
Request Path/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.NetApp/netAppAccounts/{accountName}/capacityPools/{poolName}/volumes/{volumeName}/buckets/{bucketName}/generateCredentials
Operation IdBuckets_GenerateCredentials
Default Api Version2025-12-15-preview

Docs.summary:
Get the details of the specified volume's bucket. A bucket allows additional services, such as AI services, connect to the volume data contained in those buckets.
Request Path/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.NetApp/netAppAccounts/{accountName}/capacityPools/{poolName}/volumes/{volumeName}/buckets/{bucketName}
Operation IdBuckets_Get
Default Api Version2025-12-15-preview
Resource

The bucket details including user details, and the volume path that should be mounted inside the bucket.
Docs.summary:
Updates the details of a volume bucket.
